title: Due Diligence
content:
Increase Efficiency. Increase Accuracy. Reduce Cost.

#### Dedicated Due Diligence Review Lawyers
- An experienced team of due diligence review lawyers undertake your mandate; easily assembled on short notice, the team can be quickly scaled according to project size
- Our due diligence review lawyers are a dedicated team of Canadian qualified, skilled and experienced lawyers

#### Leading Edge Contract Analysis Technology
- Our due diligence review lawyers use a cloud-based software platform to assist with automating the review process, thereby saving time, minimizing fees and increasing the accuracy of a review
- ​The automated review process includes using artificial intelligence to review contracts, identify provisions of interest, and assist with the population of disclosure schedules.

#### A Competitive Pricing Model
- We can offer pricing that is far more cost effective than traditional due diligence models, while delivering accuracy ​and greater cost predictability.
- ​MT❯3, formerly Wortzmans, continues to offer the same competitive pricing structure

#### McCarthy Tétrault M&A Services
- In addition to due diligence, MT❯3 works closely with McCarthy Tétrault's national Mergers & Acquisitions team to assist with your transaction.
